sql_array: CREATE TABLE fruit_salad (id INTEGER, fruits TEXT);
INSERT INTO fruit_salad VALUES (1, concat_ws(', ', 'Banana', 'Apple', NULL, 'Melon'));
UPDATE fruit_salad SET fruits = concat_ws(' | ', fruits, 'Kiwi') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT concat_ws('; ', fruits) AS combined_fruits FROM fruit_salad WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO fruit_salad VALUES (2, concat_ws(', ', 'Orange', NULL, 'Grape'));
